arts.ttl: Three Arsenal concerns ahead of Atalanta Champions League visit
arts.sum: Atalanta are set to host Arsenal on Thursday night in their first Champions League fixture...

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard injury hint in Mikel Arteta footage suddenly has Arsenal fans hopeful
arts.sum: Arsenal supporters have been given hope about Martin Odegaard, who is facing a lengthy spell on the sidelines after suffering an ankle injury on international duty

arts.ttl: Arsenal urged to show ‘different face’ in Odegaard absence
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal to show a ‘different face’ in the absence of injured captain Martin Odegaard. The midfielder sustained an ankle injury while representing Norway during the international break and is facing an extended spell on the sidelines. arts.ttl: Arsenal could lose star in January as Italian giants plot £25m transfer move
arts.sum: Arsenal have continued to strengthen their defence and have seen Takehiro Tomiyasu drop down Mikel Arteta's pecking order at the Emirates Stadium and he could be available for transfer

arts.ttl: Arsenal offered Martin Odegaard hope as Norway boss makes fresh injury statement
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta confirmed on Wednesday night that Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard had suffered ankle ligament damage after he was crocked in Norway's recent 2-1 win over Austria during the international break

arts.ttl: Arteta has ‘big admiration’ for ‘amazing’ Atalanta story
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has outlined his admiration for Atalanta as Arsenal prepare to face the Italian side this evening. Arsenal begin their Champions League campaign with a first-ever clash against the Serie A side in Bergamo, as the Gunners look to improve on last season’s run to the quarter-finals. arts.ttl: Arsenal player open to leave the club in January to join Champions League giants
arts.sum: Arsenal could lose one of their players in the January transfer window with a possible move to Serie A being reported. According to The Sun, Arsenal defender Takehiro Tomiyasu is attracting interest from three Serie A clubs and the player is keen on a move away from the Emirates Stadium. arts.ttl: Arteta wants Champions League ‘belief’ from Arsenal
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal to have ‘belief’ in this season’s Champions League as the Gunners face Atalanta on Thursday. Arsenal begin their 2024/25 campaign with a first-ever meeting with the Italian side in Bergamo.
